name: Check of books sorting in LYRASIS
fullName: Catalog Navigation: Check of books sorting in LYRASIS

steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
When  I open categories by chain and chain starts from CategoryScreen:
Then  Books are sorted by Author by default on subcategory screen in 'LYRASIS Reads'
And  There are sorting by 'Author', 'Recently Added' and 'Title' in 'LYRASIS Reads' on subcategory screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Check of books sorting in LYRASIS
